=== GPTQ Experiments - opt-125m ===

=== FP16 Baseline ===

ptb : 32.5511474609375
c4 : 24.605934143066406

=== RTN 4-bit ===

ptb : 45.114402770996094
c4 : 31.639997482299805

=== GPTQ 4-bit ===

ptb : 35.58171081542969
c4 : 37.093994140625

ptb : 47.2323112487793
